'''鈭歭-ch-ng''' ('''lachanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubify|rubify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubify|rubify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-ch-ng
|-
! Lemma
| lachanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lachangithi|lachangithi]] || [[word:lachangiji|lachangiji]] || [[word:lachangishi|lachangishi]] || [[word:lachangi|lachangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachanguthuth|lachanguthuth]] || [[word:lachangujuj|lachangujuj]] || [[word:lachangushush|lachangushush]] || [[word:lachang|lachang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachanguthu|lachanguthu]] || [[word:lachanguju|lachanguju]] || [[word:lachangushu|lachangushu]] || [[word:lachangu|lachangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachangufuth|lachangufuth]] || [[word:lachangufuj|lachangufuj]] || [[word:lachangufush|lachangufush]] || [[word:lachanguf|lachanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lachangethe|lachangethe]] || [[word:lachangeje|lachangeje]] || [[word:lachangeshe|lachangeshe]] || [[word:lachange|lachange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachangothoth|lachangothoth]] || [[word:lachangojoj|lachangojoj]] || [[word:lachangoshosh|lachangoshosh]] || [[word:lachang|lachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachangotho|lachangotho]] || [[word:lachangojo|lachangojo]] || [[word:lachangosho|lachangosho]] || [[word:lachango|lachango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachangofoth|lachangofoth]] || [[word:lachangofoj|lachangofoj]] || [[word:lachangofosh|lachangofosh]] || [[word:lachangof|lachangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lachang忙th忙|lachang忙th忙]] || [[word:lachang忙j忙|lachang忙j忙]] || [[word:lachang忙sh忙|lachang忙sh忙]] || [[word:lachang忙|lachang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachangathath|lachangathath]] || [[word:lachangajaj|lachangajaj]] || [[word:lachangashash|lachangashash]] || [[word:lachang|lachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachangatha|lachangatha]] || [[word:lachangaja|lachangaja]] || [[word:lachangasha|lachangasha]] || [[word:lachanga|lachanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachangafath|lachangafath]] || [[word:lachangafaj|lachangafaj]] || [[word:lachangafash|lachangafash]] || [[word:lachangaf|lachangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lachangasha|lachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golachangasha|golachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilachangasha|gokilachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lachangn眉sha|lachangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golachangnkn眉sha|golachangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilachangn眉sha|gokilachangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lachangsh毛sha|lachangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golachangnksh毛sha|golachangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilachangsh毛sha|gokilachangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lachangrosha|lachangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golachangnkrosha|golachangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilachangrosha|gokilachangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lachangmusha|lachangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golachangnkmusha|golachangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachangmusha|gokilachangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lachangsherasha|lachangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golachangnksherasha|golachangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilachangsherasha|gokilachangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lachangasha|lachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golachangnkngasha|golachangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilachangasha|gokilachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lachangyasha|lachangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golachangnkyasha|golachangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilachangyasha|gokilachangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lachangyamasha|lachangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golachangnkyamasha|golachangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilachangyamasha|gokilachangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lachangn眉sh毛sha|lachangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golachangnkn眉sh毛sha|golachangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilachangn眉sh毛sha|gokilachangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lachangn眉rosha|lachangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golachangnkn眉rosha|golachangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilachangn眉rosha|gokilachangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachangn眉musha|lachangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golachangnkn眉musha|golachangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachangn眉musha|gokilachangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lachangsh毛n眉sha|lachangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golachangnksh毛n眉sha|golachangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilachangsh毛n眉sha|gokilachangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lachangsh毛rosha|lachangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golachangnksh毛rosha|golachangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilachangsh毛rosha|gokilachangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachangsh毛musha|lachangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golachangnksh毛musha|golachangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachangsh毛musha|gokilachangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lachangron眉sha|lachangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golachangnkron眉sha|golachangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilachangron眉sha|gokilachangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lachangrosh毛sha|lachangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golachangnkrosh毛sha|golachangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilachangrosh毛sha|gokilachangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lachangromusha|lachangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golachangnkromusha|golachangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilachangromusha|gokilachangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lachangmun眉sha|lachangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golachangnkmun眉sha|golachangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilachangmun眉sha|gokilachangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lachangmush毛sha|lachangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golachangnkmush毛sha|golachangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilachangmush毛sha|gokilachangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lachangmurosha|lachangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golachangnkmurosha|golachangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilachangmurosha|gokilachangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lachang|lachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:l忙ch忙ng|l忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holachang|holachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hol忙ch忙ng|hol忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholachang|hoholachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohol忙ch忙ng|hohol忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉lachang|n眉lachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉l忙ch忙ng|n眉l忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉lachang|n眉n眉lachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉l忙ch忙ng|n眉n眉l忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂lachang|n茂lachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂l忙ch忙ng|n茂l忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂lachang|n茂n茂lachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂l忙ch忙ng|n茂n茂l忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulachang|lulachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lul忙ch忙ng|lul忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululachang|lululachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulul忙ch忙ng|lulul忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilachang|lilachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lil忙ch忙ng|lil忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililachang|lililachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilil忙ch忙ng|lilil忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolachang|kolachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kol忙ch忙ng|kol忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolachang|kokolachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokol忙ch忙ng|kokol忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelachang|kelachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kel忙ch忙ng|kel忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelachang|kekelachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekel忙ch忙ng|kekel忙ch忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
